name: loop-spec
description: Spec-driven development workflow for Claude Code. 5 phases (SPEC/DISCUSS/PLAN/EXECUTE/VERIFY), 3 tiers, fixed per-role model map, 4 execution styles, EXECUTE concurrency ladder (subagent/loop-fleet/team/workflow by DAG width), bundled loop-runner skill (bounded autonomous loops with verifier integrity, spec→plan compiler, fleet supervisor), teams-optional operation, optional graphify codebase mapping, user-gate verification flow, Ralph remediation loop, dynamic-workflow fan-out acceleration, workspace (multi-repo) mode, standalone assess and quality-loop skills.
